data.title: Smiths Group Buys Back and Cancels Over 240,000 Shares
data.description:

The latest update is out from Smiths Group plc ( (GB:SMIN) ).

Smiths Group plc has repurchased a total of 241,118 of its ordinary shares on 19 January 2026 across multiple trading venues, at volume-weighted average prices of around 2,580 pence per share. The company plans to cancel the repurchased shares, a move that reduces its share count and may enhance earnings per share and capital efficiency, underlining ongoing efforts to return value to shareholders within its broader industrial engineering strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:SMIN) stock is a Hold with a £2821.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Smiths Group plc stock, see the GB:SMIN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:SMIN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:SMIN is a Neutral.

Smiths Group plc’s overall stock score reflects strong financial health and strategic initiatives to enhance shareholder value. However, technical indicators suggest bearish momentum, and the high P/E ratio indicates potential overvaluation. Positive earnings call and corporate events provide a supportive outlook.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:SMIN stock, click here.

More about Smiths Group plc

Smiths Group plc is a long-established industrial engineering company listed on the London Stock Exchange, operating in the energy, industrials and construction sectors. With around 16,000 employees in over 50 countries, it focuses on solving complex customer challenges tied to decarbonisation and the growing need for process and energy efficiency.

Average Trading Volume: 1,180,771

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: £8.25B

data.title: M&G Credit Income Investment Trust Announces Final Interim Dividend for 2025
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

M&G Credit Income Investment Trust Plc ( (GB:MGCI) ) has shared an update.

M&G Credit Income Investment Trust plc has declared a final interim quarterly dividend of 1.85 pence per ordinary share for the financial year ended 31 December 2025. Together with the three earlier quarterly payouts, this distribution equates to an annualised return of SONIA plus 4%, based on the opening net asset value at 1 January 2025 adjusted for the prior year’s final dividend, underlining the trust’s ability to meet its income target for shareholders. The board has applied the UK ‘streaming’ regime to the payment, designating 1.20 pence per share as an interest distribution and 0.65 pence as a dividend distribution, a structure that may carry differing tax implications for investors. The dividend will be paid on 20 February 2026 to shareholders on the register as of 30 January, with an ex-dividend date of 29 January, providing clarity on timing for income-focused holders.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:MGCI) stock is a Buy with a £108.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on M&G Credit Income Investment Trust Plc stock, see the GB:MGCI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:MGCI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:MGCI is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial strength (low leverage and generally strong profitability) but held back by historically volatile revenue and uneven cash generation. Technicals are mildly bullish with price above key moving averages, while valuation is supported by a high dividend yield and a moderate P/E. Recent corporate events are broadly positive (demand-led issuance, director buying, interim dividend), with slight dilution risk.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:MGCI stock, click here.

More about M&G Credit Income Investment Trust Plc

M&G Credit Income Investment Trust plc is a UK-listed investment trust focused on credit and income-generating assets. It aims to deliver returns linked to short-term interest rates plus a spread, providing investors with a diversified portfolio of credit instruments and a target income stream over time.

Average Trading Volume: 418,616

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

For a thorough assessment of MGCI stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Rocket Doctor AI Upsizes Private Placement to $4.5 Million on Strong Demand
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Rocket Doctor AI ( (TSE:AIDR) ) just unveiled an update.

Rocket Doctor AI Inc. has increased the size of its previously announced non-brokered private placement under the listed issuer financing exemption to a maximum of $4.5 million in gross proceeds, with units priced at $0.70 each, citing strong investor demand while keeping all other terms of the offering unchanged. The upsized financing underscores growing market interest in the company’s AI-powered healthcare technology and is expected to bolster its capacity to scale its digital health platforms and decision support systems, potentially strengthening its competitive position in virtual care and expanding its reach into underserved markets in Canada and the U.S.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:AIDR) stock is a Hold with a C$0.78 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Rocket Doctor AI stock, see the TSE:AIDR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:AIDR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:AIDR is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by weak financial performance—minimal revenue scale, large operating losses, and sharply worsening cash burn—implying high execution and funding risk. Technicals are also soft (negative MACD and price below short/intermediate moving averages). Offsetting factors include a string of positive corporate developments (U.S. insurer access expansion, funding/grants, partnerships, and an announced acquisition), but valuation support is limited given negative earnings and no dividend yield provided.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:AIDR stock, click here.

More about Rocket Doctor AI

Rocket Doctor AI Inc. operates in the digital health and medical AI industry, providing physician-built, AI-powered solutions aimed at making high-quality healthcare accessible across the patient journey. Its cornerstone technology, the Global Library of Medicine, is a clinically validated decision support system developed with input from hundreds of physicians worldwide. Through its affiliated AI-driven digital health platform and marketplace, Rocket Doctor has supported more than 300 physicians in delivering over 700,000 patient visits, enabling virtual and hybrid practices that reduce administrative burdens, improve care consistency, and expand access for underserved, rural and remote communities in Canada as well as Medicaid and Medicare patients in the United States.

YTD Price Performance: 8.22%

Average Trading Volume: 242,099

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$67.13M

data.description:

Monks Investment Trust Shs GBP ( (GB:MNKS) ) has issued an update.

The Monks Investment Trust PLC, a UK-listed global equity investment trust managed by Baillie Gifford, offers shareholders access to a diversified portfolio aimed at long-term capital appreciation. The company has repurchased 170,000 of its own ordinary shares at 1,531.90p per share, which will be held in treasury, bringing total treasury holdings to 90,506,930 shares and leaving 162,664,530 shares in issue. This transaction modestly reduces the free float and can be used by investors as the reference figure for regulatory threshold calculations under the FCA’s disclosure and transparency rules, signalling continued active capital management by the trust’s board.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:MNKS) stock is a Buy with a £1699.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Monks Investment Trust Shs GBP stock, see the GB:MNKS Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:MNKS is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by highly volatile earnings/revenue and inconsistent cash conversion despite a conservative balance sheet and positive cash flows. Technicals are supportive with price above key moving averages and positive MACD, while valuation looks attractive (low P/E and ~3.38% yield). Corporate actions (notably buybacks) add a modest positive offset.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:MNKS stock, click here.

data.title: Praetura Growth VCT Allots New Shares Under Ongoing Offer
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Praetura Growth VCT PLC ( (GB:PGV) ) is now available.

Praetura Growth VCT plc has allotted 354,621 new ordinary shares as part of its ongoing £10 million offer for subscription, with an additional £10 million over-allotment facility, for the tax year ending 5 April 2026. The shares were issued at prices between 99.33p and 100.34p, referenced to the latest published NAV of 99.33p, bringing the total number of ordinary shares in issue to 7,396,983 and setting the new baseline for voting rights and disclosure calculations under FCA rules; the company is now seeking admission of these shares to the FCA’s Official List and to trading on the London Stock Exchange’s main market, with dealings expected to commence around 21 January 2026, a step that supports its capital-raising efforts and provides additional liquidity for investors.

More about Praetura Growth VCT PLC

Praetura Growth VCT plc is a UK-listed venture capital trust that raises capital from investors to back high-growth, early-stage and scale-up businesses, offering exposure to a diversified portfolio of unquoted and smaller quoted companies while providing investors with the tax advantages associated with VCT structures.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: £3.02M

data.title: Happy Belly Opens First Yolks Breakfast Location in Quebec as Part of Aggressive Expansion Drive
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Happy Belly Food Group ( (TSE:HBFG) ) has provided an update.

Happy Belly Food Group has opened the first Quebec location of its Yolks Breakfast brand in Dollard-des-Ormeaux, a high-traffic Montreal suburb, marking the first of 26 contractually committed Yolks sites planned for the province under an area development agreement with experienced local operators. The launch, which brings Yolks to six operating restaurants out of 51 secured nationally and contributes to Happy Belly’s 666 contracted locations across its portfolio, underscores the company’s asset-light franchising and disciplined real estate strategy as it pushes to establish Yolks as a leading breakfast concept in Quebec and reinforces Happy Belly’s positioning as one of Canada’s fastest-growing multi-brand restaurant groups.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:HBFG) stock is a Hold with a C$2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Happy Belly Food Group stock, see the TSE:HBFG Stock Forecast page.

Technical analysis indicates a bullish trend, but overbought signals suggest caution. The valuation is weak due to a negative P/E ratio and lack of dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:HBFG stock, click here.

Happy Belly Food Group Inc. is a Canadian consolidator focused on acquiring and scaling emerging restaurant and food brands. Its portfolio includes concepts such as Heal Wellness, Rosie’s Burgers, Yolks Breakfast, and Via Cibo Italian Street Food, targeting growth through franchising and multi-brand expansion across Canada.

Atco Mining Inc. ( (TSE:QBTQ) ) has shared an announcement.

SuperQ Quantum Computing Inc. has strengthened its leadership in both scientific development and commercialization by appointing renowned quantum scholar Prof. Dr. Mathew Chandrankunnel and former Amazon Web Services infrastructure executive Tim Toole to its advisory board. Chandrankunnel will guide the company’s academic partnerships, ethical innovation and global research initiatives, while Toole will focus on accelerating go-to-market strategies, enterprise partnerships and commercialization pathways for SuperQ’s hybrid classical-quantum platforms, a move management says is key to balancing deep scientific rigor with aggressive market execution as the company scales its global quantum ecosystem.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:QBTQ) stock is a Hold with a C$1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Atco Mining Inc. stock, see the TSE:QBTQ Stock Forecast page.

Technicals are supportive but look overbought, while valuation support is limited due to a negative P/E and no dividend. Positive corporate events (product announcements and financing) provide some offset but do not overcome the current financial risk profile.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:QBTQ stock, click here.

More about Atco Mining Inc.

SuperQ Quantum Computing Inc. is a Canada-headquartered technology company focused on democratizing access to hybrid quantum and supercomputing solutions for enterprise and consumer users. Through its flagship Super™ platform and consumer-facing ChatQLM application, the company aims to make advanced computational power intuitive and accessible, targeting immediate business impact for corporate clients, research institutions and government agencies across sectors including finance, healthcare, logistics and defense, while expanding its footprint via strategic ‘Super Hubs’ in the US, Middle East and Asia.

data.title: Noble Mineral Intersects Zinc Mineralization in First Carnegie Township Drill Hole Near Timmins
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Noble Mineral Exploration ( (TSE:NOB) ) has provided an update.

Noble Mineral Exploration has completed the first hole of a diamond drill program in Carnegie Township near Timmins, Ontario, conducted under a 50/50 partnership with 11530313 Canada Inc. on ground recently transferred to Canada Nickel, over which Noble retains a five-year exploration right for volcanogenic massive sulphide and precious metals. The initial hole returned a 6.5-metre interval grading 0.64% zinc, including a 1-metre section at 1.90% zinc with associated anomalous copper, silver and lead, and subsequent downhole MALM and surface magnetometer surveys outlined coincident electromagnetic and magnetic anomalies that will help trace the mineralized zone and guide follow-up drilling, including a second hole targeting the same structure at greater depth and two additional planned holes in Southwest Carnegie as the company continues to pursue mineralization akin to the Kidd Creek deposit.

Spark’s Take on TSE:NOB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:NOB is a Underperform.

Noble Mineral Exploration’s stock performance is significantly hindered by poor financial health, with no revenue generation and persistent losses. While technical analysis suggests mixed signals, the valuation remains unattractive with a negative P/E ratio. Despite promising exploration results and strategic corporate events, the company’s financial instability overshadows these developments.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:NOB stock, click here.

More about Noble Mineral Exploration

Noble Mineral Exploration Inc. is a Canadian-based junior exploration company focused on gold, nickel, cobalt, base metals and rare earth elements, with extensive mineral and exploration rights across roughly 70,000 hectares in Northern Ontario and about 24,000 hectares in Quebec, including its flagship Project 81 in the Timmins-Cochrane area. The company also holds interests in several related entities such as Canada Nickel Company Inc., Homeland Nickel Inc. and East Timmins Nickel Inc., and manages a portfolio of properties targeting volcanogenic massive sulphide mineralization, nickel-copper-PGM systems, graphite, uranium and rare earth deposits in Ontario, Quebec and Labrador.

Average Trading Volume: 463,096

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$47.46M

Learn more about NOB stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
